metadata.note: Revised after adversarial review - split into Session 1 (P0 only)

overview.session_focus: P0: Race conditions and resource leaks only

changes.title: TOCTOU race condition in FileLock._try_acquire_lock_once()
changes.description: File descriptor opened then lock attempted non-atomically.
changes.recommendation: Use O_SHLOCK or flock() flags directly in os.open() for atomic open-and-lock
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current lock acquisition behavior before fixing.

changes.title: Sequential git subprocess calls cause guaranteed timeout under load
changes.description: 3 sequential subprocess calls, each 2s timeout = 6s worst case.
changes.recommendation: Consolidate to single git call with --format flag (6s → 0.5s)
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current git output format before consolidating.

changes.title: TOCTOU race condition in _check_and_remove_stale_lock()
changes.description: File checked, stat'd, then deleted non-atomically.
changes.recommendation: Use atomic file operations with proper locking
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current lock cleanup behavior before fixing.

changes.title: TOCTOU race condition in validate_envelope()
changes.description: Path validation split across multiple checks.
changes.recommendation: Consolidate path validation into single atomic check
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current validation behavior before fixing.

changes.title: TOCTOU race condition in verify_evidence_freshness()
changes.description: Evidence file could be replaced between validation and hash computation.
changes.recommendation: Compute hash first, then validate atomically
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current evidence validation before fixing.

changes.title: File descriptor leak in terminal_file_registry._save_registry()
changes.description: File descriptor not properly closed in error path.
changes.recommendation: Use context manager or try-finally to ensure cleanup
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current file descriptor usage before fixing.

changes.title: Temporary file leak in atomic_write_with_retry()
changes.description: Temporary file not cleaned up on exception.
changes.recommendation: Use try-finally or context manager for temp file cleanup
changes.rollback: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current temp file cleanup before fixing.

validation_strategy.test_approach: Characterization tests for each change before applying fixes (RED phase)

next_sessions.focus: P1: Error handling and performance (5 issues)
